text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: imp->gad

Now that I have commit-ability, it seemed I should take over this PR. 
I already checked with Warner, and he gave the OK for it.  I will 
try committing my most-recent patch to do this soon, probably later 
this week.  (first I want to see if my edit-pr worked... :-)
